Guest Reviews

See what our guests have to say about their dining experience at Sangeet Restaurant.

4.7

6

Total Reviews

Enjoyed your visit?

We'd love to hear about your experience.

Write a Review

Sarah L.

Verified

15 May 2026

The best Indian food I've had in Hong Kong. The butter chicken is absolutely divine and the naan is perfect!

James W.

Verified

10 May 2026

Amazing momos and great atmosphere. The staff are incredibly welcoming. Will definitely come back!

Ming C.

Verified

2 May 2026

Authentic flavors and generous portions. The biryani is a must-try. Slightly long wait during peak hours.

Priya S.

Verified

28 Apr 2026

Felt like home! The dal makhani and roti brought back so many memories. Thank you Sangeet!

Tom H.

20 Apr 2026

Came for a birthday dinner and the team made it so special. The thali set is incredible value.

Lisa K.

Verified

15 Apr 2026

Really enjoyed the vegetarian options. The paneer tikka masala is my new favorite!

SangeetRestaurant

Authentic Indian & Nepali cuisine crafted with love and tradition, right in the heart of Hong Kong.
